books.title: Elantris
books.synopsis: In the shadow of the once-glorious city of Elantris, Prince Raoden is cursed with the Shaod and cast into its crumbling ruins. As his betrothed Sarene navigates deadly politics in the capital and a zealous priest threatens to conquer the nation, Raoden struggles to restore hope among the damned and uncover the secret behind Elantris's fall.

books.title: Mistborn: The Final Empire
books.synopsis: In a world of ash and darkness ruled by the immortal Lord Ruler, a gifted street thief named Vin joins a crew of Allomancers led by the charismatic Kelsier in an audacious plan to overthrow the empire. As Vin discovers her extraordinary powers and infiltrates noble society, she uncovers secrets that could reshape the world.

books.title: The Hope of Elantris
books.synopsis: A short coda to Elantris: while the city burns and its people flee, a schoolteacher and the children in her care find an unexpected role in Elantris's salvation.

books.title: Mistborn: The Well of Ascension
books.synopsis: With the Lord Ruler dead, Elend Venture struggles to hold the city of Luthadel together as three rival armies converge on its walls. Vin must navigate political intrigue, a mysterious shapeshifting threat, and the legend of the Well of Ascension before an ancient evil is unleashed upon the world.

books.title: Mistborn: The Hero of Ages
books.synopsis: As the world crumbles under ashfalls and deadly mists, Vin and Elend race to find the hidden caches left by the Lord Ruler and unlock the secret to defeating Ruin, a god-like force of destruction. The fate of all life hinges on understanding the true nature of the ancient prophecies and the role of the Hero of Ages.

books.title: Warbreaker
books.synopsis: Two princesses from the austere highland kingdom of Idris are drawn into the colorful and politically treacherous court of Hallandren, where gods rule and magic is fueled by color and breath. As war looms between the two nations, alliances shift and secrets about the true nature of the Returned gods come to light.

books.title: The Gathering Storm
books.synopsis: Rand al'Thor hardens himself against the madness of saidin as Tarmon Gai'don approaches, while Egwene al'Vere works from within the White Tower to reunify the fractured Aes Sedai. The forces of the Shadow gather strength as the world teeters on the brink of the Last Battle.

books.title: The Way of Kings
books.synopsis: On the war-torn Shattered Plains, Kaladin fights for survival as a bridge slave while the scholarly Shallan seeks to steal a fabrial from the renowned Jasnah Kholin. As ancient truths about the Knights Radiant resurface, Dalinar Kholin receives apocalyptic visions that may hold the key to saving Roshar from the coming Desolation.

books.title: Towers of Midnight
books.synopsis: Perrin Aybara confronts the Whitecloak army and his own inner demons while Mat Cauthon ventures into the deadly Tower of Ghenjei to rescue Moiraine. With the Last Battle imminent, the heroes race to forge alliances and prepare the world for Tarmon Gai'don.

books.title: The Alloy of Law
books.synopsis: Three hundred years after the events of the original trilogy, the gunslinging lawman Waxillium Ladrian returns to the city of Elendel to take up his noble house's affairs. When a series of kidnappings and robberies plague the city, Wax and his irreverent partner Wayne are drawn into a conspiracy that blends Allomancy and Feruchemy with six-shooters.

books.title: The Eleventh Metal
books.synopsis: A prequel to Mistborn: The Final Empire. A younger Kelsier, newly come into his powers, is trained by the mysterious Gemmel and learns the hard lessons of Allomancy — and of a mysterious eleventh metal.

books.title: The Emperor's Soul
books.synopsis: Condemned to death after being caught forging a priceless masterpiece, the Forger Shai is offered one impossible reprieve: to reforge the soul of the Emperor, whose mind was destroyed in an assassination attempt. Locked in a room with a hundred days to master a stamp that could rewrite a man, she must outwit the arbiters who mean to execute her the moment her work is done.

books.title: A Memory of Light
books.synopsis: The Last Battle has arrived as Rand al'Thor leads the forces of Light against the Dark One at Shayol Ghul. Every nation and every hero must commit everything to this final stand, where the fate of the Pattern and all of existence hangs in the balance.

books.title: The Rithmatist
books.synopsis: In an alternate America where magic is performed through chalk drawings called Rithmatics, non-Rithmatist student Joel Saxon becomes entangled in a mystery when Rithmatic students begin disappearing from his academy. Working alongside the eccentric Professor Fitch, Joel must unravel a conspiracy that threatens to unleash wild chalk creations upon the world.

books.title: Steelheart
books.synopsis: In a world where superpowered beings called Epics have seized control and rule as tyrants, young David Charleston joins the Reckoners, a rebel group dedicated to assassinating Epics. David is obsessed with bringing down Steelheart, the seemingly invincible Epic who rules over the steel-encased city of Newcago and murdered David's father.

books.title: Shadows for Silence in the Forests of Hell
books.synopsis: Silence Montane runs a waystop in a haunted forest where the dead walk as Shades. To protect her family and pay her debts she breaks the Simple Rules for coin — a gamble that could doom them all when a notorious outlaw arrives at her door.

books.title: Words of Radiance
books.synopsis: Shallan Davar journeys to the Shattered Plains to become Jasnah's ward while harboring a secret mission from the Ghostbloods. As Kaladin struggles with his new role protecting Dalinar and ancient Parshendi secrets emerge, the true scope of the Voidbringer threat begins to reveal itself and new Knights Radiant arise.

books.title: Sixth of the Dusk
books.synopsis: On a chain of islands where the wildlife hunts by sensing thought, the trapper Sixth of the Dusk survives with the aid of two Aviar — until visions of his own death, and off-worlders bearing impossible technology, warn that his world is about to change forever.

books.title: Firefight
books.synopsis: David and the Reckoners travel to the flooded city of Babylon Restored, formerly Manhattan, to confront the powerful Epic known as Regalia. As David gets closer to the enigmatic Epic Firefight, he begins to question everything he believes about Epics and discovers that the secret to their weakness may change the world.

books.title: Shadows of Self
books.synopsis: A shapeshifting kandra is murdering prominent citizens of Elendel, stoking class tensions that threaten to erupt into revolution. Wax must hunt down the killer while confronting uncomfortable truths about the city's governance and his own painful past with the woman he once loved.

books.title: The Bands of Mourning
books.synopsis: Wax, Wayne, and Marasi pursue rumors of the legendary Bands of Mourning, a mythical metal mind said to grant the powers of the Lord Ruler himself. Their quest takes them to the remote city of New Seran and beyond, uncovering a secret society and technology that could reshape the Basin.

books.title: Calamity
books.synopsis: David and the Reckoners launch their most dangerous mission yet: a direct assault on Calamity, the glowing red star that appeared in the sky and gave Epics their powers. As David's own Epic abilities begin to manifest, he must find a way to confront the source of all Epics before it destroys the world.

books.title: Edgedancer
books.synopsis: The irrepressible young Radiant Lift arrives in the great city of Yeddaw chasing free food and a mystery, only to find someone is hunting people with budding powers like her own. With the Herald Nale on her trail, Lift must decide what kind of person — and what kind of hero — she wants to become.

books.title: Mistborn: Secret History
books.synopsis: A hidden tale threaded through the original Mistborn trilogy, following Kelsier after the fall of the Final Empire as he refuses to let death be the end. It pulls back the curtain on the deepest mechanics of the cosmere — and should only be read once you know the Survivor's story, and Roshar's, well.

books.title: White Sand
books.synopsis: On the blazing Dayside of Taldain, Kenton is a weak Sand Master in a proud order. When his kind are massacred, he must claim leadership of the survivors and master the living sand to save them — while an off-world duchess pursues her own agenda.

books.title: Allomancer Jak and the Pits of Eltania
books.synopsis: The wildly embellished broadsheet adventures of Allomancer Jak, gentleman and adventurer of the Elendel Basin, as (barely) survived and (heavily) footnoted by his long-suffering Terris steward.

books.title: Oathbringer
books.synopsis: Dalinar Kholin must unite the nations of Roshar against the Voidbringer invasion while confronting the terrible memories of his blood-soaked past as the Blackthorn. As the enemy occupies the holy city of Kholinar and the Unmade spread corruption, the Knights Radiant struggle to reclaim their legacy and find a path to victory.

books.title: Skyward
books.synopsis: On the planet Detritus, humanity lives underground to survive alien attacks, and only fighter pilots stand between them and extinction. Spensa Nightshade, daughter of a disgraced pilot branded a coward, fights for her chance to fly and prove her father's innocence while uncovering the truth about the alien threat.

books.title: Starsight
books.synopsis: Spensa infiltrates an alien space station to learn the secrets of faster-than-light travel and the true nature of the enemy that has kept humanity trapped on Detritus. Disguised among alien species, she discovers that the galaxy-spanning conflict is far more complex than anyone on Detritus imagined.

books.title: Rhythm of War
books.synopsis: As the war between humans and singers escalates, Navani Kholin delves into the science of fabrial technology while trapped in an occupied Urithiru. Kaladin battles his own depression while defending the tower's unconscious Radiants, and Shallan confronts the Ghostbloods and her fractured identities in a struggle for Roshar's future.

books.title: Dawnshard
books.synopsis: When a ghost ship is found adrift, the Thaylen ship-owner Rysn and the crew of the Wandersail sail for the forbidden, deadly island of Aimia to uncover what befell it — and stumble onto a secret, the Dawnshard, powerful enough to reshape the war for Roshar.

books.title: Cytonic
books.synopsis: Spensa ventures into the nowhere, a mysterious dimension outside normal space, to hunt the ancient Delver entities threatening the galaxy. Lost among strange fragments of civilizations and accompanied by unlikely allies, she must master her cytonic powers and confront the true nature of the Delvers before she can find her way home.

books.title: The Lost Metal
books.synopsis: Wax and Wayne face their greatest challenge as a terrorist group called the Set threatens to detonate a weapon capable of destroying Elendel. With Harmony's power constrained and the fate of Scadrial hanging in the balance, the crew must confront enemies both mortal and divine in a desperate race against annihilation.

books.title: Tress of the Emerald Sea
books.synopsis: A simple girl named Tress sets out across the deadly spore seas to rescue her beloved Charlie from the terrible Sorceress. Narrated by the worldhopper Hoid, this fairy-tale adventure follows Tress as she discovers her cleverness and courage aboard a pirate ship sailing oceans of living aether spores.

books.title: Yumi and the Nightmare Painter
books.synopsis: Yumi, a spiritually gifted girl who stacks stones to summon spirits, and Nikaro, a painter who uses light to trap nightmares, find their lives mysteriously swapped across two very different worlds. As they struggle to understand their connection, they uncover a devastating truth about the nature of their realities.

books.title: The Sunlit Man
books.synopsis: The cosmere wanderer Nomad crash-lands on a tidally locked planet where civilization must constantly flee the deadly sunlight that sweeps across its surface. Running from a relentless pursuer with ties to his past, Nomad becomes entangled with the local people's fight for freedom against their oppressive rulers.

books.title: Defiant
books.synopsis: Spensa returns to Detritus for a final showdown as the Superiority's forces close in on humanity's last refuge. With her cytonic abilities and the alliances she's forged across the galaxy, she must lead the fight to secure humanity's place among the stars once and for all.

books.title: Wind and Truth
books.synopsis: The contest of champions between Dalinar and Odium reaches its climax as the fate of Roshar hangs on a single duel. Szeth confronts his tortured past and the corruption within Shinovar, Kaladin faces his greatest personal trial, and the truth behind the Desolations and the Oathpact is finally revealed.

books.title: The Isles of the Emberdark
books.synopsis: A full Cosmere novel expanding the world of First of the Sun. As worldhoppers reach ever deeper into the archipelago and the dark beyond it, the fate of the Aviar — and secrets that touch the whole cosmere — hang in the balance.

books.title: The Fires of December
books.synopsis: A forthcoming Cosmere novel, due late 2026.

books.title: Tailored Realities
books.synopsis: A collection of Brandon Sanderson's science-fiction and fantasy short works, including the thriller "Moment Zero".

characters.name: Raoden
characters.description: Crown prince of Arelon who is cursed by the Shaod and cast into the fallen city of Elantris.

characters.name: Sarene
characters.description: Princess of Teod and Raoden's betrothed who arrives to find him presumed dead and must navigate Arelish politics.

characters.name: Hrathen
characters.description: High-ranking Derethi gyorn tasked with converting Arelon to Shu-Dereth within ninety days or see it destroyed.

characters.name: Galladon
characters.description: A gruff Dula man and Raoden's first friend in Elantris who helps him restore order among the fallen.

places.name: Elantris
places.description: The once-glorious city of the gods, now a crumbling ruin filled with cursed and broken inhabitants.

places.name: Kae
places.description: The capital city of Arelon, built in the shadow of Elantris and seat of political power.

places.name: Fjorden
places.description: The powerful eastern empire that seeks to conquer Arelon through religious conversion.

characters.name: Vin
characters.description: A street urchin who discovers she is a powerful Allomancer and becomes central to the rebellion against the Lord Ruler.

characters.name: Kelsier
characters.description: A charismatic Mistborn thief and revolutionary who leads a crew in an impossible heist to overthrow the Final Empire.

characters.name: Elend Venture
characters.description: An idealistic young nobleman who reads forbidden books and dreams of a more just society.

characters.name: Sazed
characters.description: A Terris Keeper who collects and preserves the world's lost religions using his Feruchemical abilities.

characters.name: The Lord Ruler
characters.description: The immortal god-emperor who has ruled the Final Empire with absolute power for a thousand years.

places.name: Luthadel
places.description: The capital of the Final Empire, a sprawling city of ash-covered streets divided between noble keeps and skaa slums.

places.name: Kredik Shaw
places.description: The Hill of a Thousand Spires, the Lord Ruler's imposing palace at the heart of Luthadel.

places.name: The Pits of Hathsin
places.description: A brutal prison mine where the Lord Ruler sends his worst enemies to harvest atium.

characters.name: Vin
characters.description: Now a legendary figure among the skaa, Vin struggles to protect Elend and the fledgling kingdom of Luthadel.

characters.name: Elend Venture
characters.description: The young king of Luthadel who must learn to be a leader as three armies besiege his city.

characters.name: Zane
characters.description: A mysterious and unstable Mistborn who serves Straff Venture and becomes obsessed with Vin.

characters.name: OreSeur
characters.description: A kandra bound by contract to serve Vin, taking on the bones and identity of a fallen friend.

characters.name: Sazed
characters.description: A Keeper whose faith is shaken as he searches for the truth behind the prophecies of the Hero of Ages.

places.name: Luthadel
places.description: The newly freed capital now besieged by three armies and struggling to establish a new government.

places.name: The Well of Ascension
places.description: A legendary pool of concentrated divine power hidden beneath Luthadel that draws Vin to its depths.

places.name: Terris
places.description: The mountainous homeland of the Keepers and Feruchemists, targeted for destruction by the Lord Ruler.

characters.name: Vin
characters.description: Now bearing the power of Preservation, Vin faces the ultimate battle against the god Ruin to save the world.

characters.name: Elend Venture
characters.description: Emperor and now a powerful Mistborn, Elend leads desperate campaigns to save the remnants of civilization.

characters.name: Sazed
characters.description: A Keeper who has lost his faith but holds the key to understanding the true nature of the world's creation.

characters.name: TenSoon
characters.description: A kandra of the Third Generation who defies his people's contract to warn them of Ruin's influence.

characters.name: Ruin
characters.description: The god of entropy and destruction who has been freed from his prison and seeks to unmake the world.

places.name: Fadrex City
places.description: A western dominance city that holds one of the Lord Ruler's supply caches and is controlled by a stubborn king.

places.name: Urteau
places.description: A canal city in the northern dominance where skaa revolutionaries have overthrown the nobility.

places.name: The Kandra Homeland
places.description: The underground cavern system where the kandra live and guard their sacred trust from the Lord Ruler.

characters.name: Siri
characters.description: The youngest Idrian princess sent to marry the God King of Hallandren in her sister's place.

characters.name: Vivenna
characters.description: An Idrian princess trained from birth for a political marriage who instead becomes a covert agent in Hallandren.

characters.name: Lightsong
characters.description: A witty and irreverent Returned god in Hallandren who doubts his own divinity and investigates a murder.

characters.name: Vasher
characters.description: A mysterious and dangerous swordsman who carries the legendary sentient sword Nightblood.

characters.name: Susebron
characters.description: The God King of Hallandren who holds immense Biochromatic power but has been kept mute and controlled by his priests.

places.name: Hallandren
places.description: A vibrant tropical kingdom ruled by Returned gods, known for its color-rich culture and Biochromatic magic.

places.name: T'Telir
places.description: The capital city of Hallandren and seat of the Court of Gods where the Returned hold power.

places.name: Idris
places.description: An austere highland kingdom that values restraint and muted colors, perpetually in tension with Hallandren.

characters.name: Rand al'Thor
characters.description: The Dragon Reborn who grows increasingly cold and ruthless as madness and the weight of destiny consume him.

characters.name: Egwene al'Vere
characters.description: The captive Amyrlin Seat who works to reunify the White Tower from within as a prisoner of Elaida's regime.

characters.name: Cadsuane Melaidhrin
characters.description: A legendary Aes Sedai who attempts to keep Rand connected to his humanity before the Last Battle.

characters.name: Aviendha
characters.description: A former Maiden of the Spear and Wise One apprentice navigating her relationship with Rand and her Aiel duties.

places.name: The White Tower
places.description: The headquarters of the Aes Sedai in Tar Valon, currently divided by internal strife under Elaida's rule.

places.name: Dragonmount
places.description: The volcanic mountain near Tar Valon where Rand al'Thor has a pivotal moment of crisis and revelation.

places.name: Ebou Dar
places.description: A southern city occupied by the Seanchan empire where Mat Cauthon navigates dangerous politics.

characters.name: Kaladin
characters.description: A former soldier turned bridge slave whose leadership and emerging Surgebinding abilities inspire those around him.

characters.name: Shallan Davar
characters.description: A young scholar with a desperate secret who seeks to become the ward of the renowned Jasnah Kholin.

characters.name: Dalinar Kholin
characters.description: A highprince and uncle to the king who receives mysterious visions urging him to unite the warring Alethi.

characters.name: Szeth-son-son-Vallano
characters.description: The Assassin in White, a Shin man bound by his Oathstone to kill as his masters command.

characters.name: Jasnah Kholin
characters.description: A brilliant and fearless scholar-princess who researches the ancient Voidbringers and the Knights Radiant.

places.name: The Shattered Plains
places.description: A vast expanse of plateaus separated by deep chasms where the Alethi wage war against the Parshendi.

places.name: Kharbranth
places.description: A city of scholars built into cliffs above the sea, home to the great Palanaeum library.

places.name: Urithiru
places.description: The legendary tower city of the Knights Radiant, long lost and sought by Dalinar through his visions.

characters.name: Perrin Aybara
characters.description: A wolfbrother and leader who must accept his nature and confront both Whitecloaks and the threat in the Wolf Dream.

characters.name: Mat Cauthon
characters.description: A roguish gambler and general who leads a daring mission into the Tower of Ghenjei to rescue Moiraine.

characters.name: Moiraine Damodred
characters.description: An Aes Sedai long thought dead who is rescued from the realm of the Aelfinn and Eelfinn.

characters.name: Galad Damodred
characters.description: The Lord Captain Commander of the Children of the Light who struggles with rigid morality in complex times.

places.name: The Tower of Ghenjei
places.description: A featureless metal tower that serves as a gateway to the realm of the Aelfinn and Eelfinn.

places.name: The Wolf Dream (Tel'aran'rhiod)
places.description: The world of dreams where Perrin battles Slayer and learns to master his wolfbrother abilities.

places.name: Caemlyn
places.description: The capital of Andor, threatened by Shadowspawn armies using a Waygate inside the city.

characters.name: Waxillium Ladrian
characters.description: A Twinborn lawman from the Roughs who reluctantly returns to Elendel to lead his noble house.

characters.name: Wayne
characters.description: Wax's eccentric partner and a skilled Slider and master of disguise with a complicated moral code.

characters.name: Marasi Colms
characters.description: A young law student and Wax's distant relative who is fascinated by the science of criminal investigation.

characters.name: Miles Hundredlives
characters.description: A former lawman turned criminal who can heal from any wound using his gold Compounding abilities.

places.name: Elendel
places.description: The grand capital city of the Elendel Basin, built in the image of the old world with canals and modern industry.

places.name: The Roughs
places.description: The frontier regions beyond the Elendel Basin where Wax served as a lawman for twenty years.

characters.name: Rand al'Thor
characters.description: The Dragon Reborn who leads humanity's forces in the final confrontation with the Dark One at Shayol Ghul.

characters.name: Egwene al'Vere
characters.description: The Amyrlin Seat who commands the Aes Sedai in the Last Battle and discovers a powerful new weave.

characters.name: Mat Cauthon
characters.description: The Prince of the Ravens who serves as the supreme general of the forces of Light.

characters.name: Perrin Aybara
characters.description: A wolfbrother who fights Slayer in the Wolf Dream to protect the dreaming armies of the Light.

characters.name: Lan Mandragoran
characters.description: The uncrowned King of Malkier who leads a desperate charge against the Shadow's armies at Tarwin's Gap.

places.name: Shayol Ghul
places.description: The mountain stronghold of the Dark One in the Blasted Lands where the final battle is waged.

places.name: Merrilor
places.description: The Field of Merrilor where the rulers of all nations gather for the last council before Tarmon Gai'don.

places.name: Thakan'dar
places.description: The valley beneath Shayol Ghul where Myrddraal blades are forged and the armies of Shadow gather.

characters.name: Joel Saxon
characters.description: A non-Rithmatist student at Armedius Academy who is fascinated by Rithmatics and becomes caught up in a mystery.

characters.name: Melody
characters.description: A struggling Rithmatist student who becomes Joel's partner in investigating the disappearances at the academy.

characters.name: Professor Fitch
characters.description: A kind but meek Rithmatics professor who is demoted after losing a challenge and mentors Joel.

characters.name: Inspector Harding
characters.description: The investigator assigned to the case of the missing Rithmatist students at Armedius Academy.

places.name: Armedius Academy
places.description: A prestigious school where both Rithmatic and non-Rithmatic students study on the isle of New Britannia.

places.name: Nebrask
places.description: The wild island territory where Rithmatists serve mandatory terms defending against the wild chalk creatures.

characters.name: David Charleston
characters.description: A young man driven by a vendetta against Steelheart, the Epic who killed his father, armed with extensive research on Epic weaknesses.

characters.name: Prof (Jonathan Phaedrus)
characters.description: The mysterious leader of the Reckoners who harbors a dangerous secret about his own nature.

characters.name: Megan
characters.description: A Reckoner operative whose true identity and loyalties become increasingly complicated as David grows closer to her.

characters.name: Steelheart
characters.description: An immensely powerful Epic who transformed Chicago into Newcago and rules it with an iron fist from his steel tower.

places.name: Newcago
places.description: The steel-encased ruins of Chicago, transformed by Steelheart's powers and ruled by him as a personal kingdom.

places.name: The Steel Catacombs
places.description: The underground tunnels beneath Newcago where ordinary humans live and the Reckoners maintain their hidden base.

characters.name: Shallan Davar
characters.description: A young woman with a traumatic past who infiltrates the Ghostbloods while developing her Lightweaving abilities.

characters.name: Kaladin
characters.description: A Windrunner struggling with his duty to protect Dalinar's family, including the king he despises.

characters.name: Dalinar Kholin
characters.description: The highprince working to reform Alethi society and forge a coalition against the Parshendi threat.

characters.name: Adolin Kholin
characters.description: Dalinar's son and a skilled duelist who fights to win Shardblades for his father's army.

characters.name: Eshonai
characters.description: A Parshendi Shardbearer and explorer who discovers a new form that could save or doom her people.

places.name: The Shattered Plains
places.description: The warfront where Alethi highprinces compete for gemhearts and where ancient secrets lie buried.

places.name: Urithiru
places.description: The rediscovered tower city of the Knights Radiant, reached through the ancient Oathgate network.

places.name: Shadesmar
places.description: The Cognitive Realm where spren live and the landscape mirrors the physical world in strange ways.

characters.name: David Charleston
characters.description: A young Reckoner who travels to Babylon Restored and begins questioning his black-and-white view of Epics.

characters.name: Megan (Firefight)
characters.description: An Epic with illusion powers whose relationship with David challenges everything the Reckoners believe about Epics.

characters.name: Prof (Jonathan Phaedrus)
characters.description: The Reckoners' leader who faces increasing strain from his secret Epic abilities as they operate in Babylon Restored.

characters.name: Regalia
characters.description: A powerful water-controlling Epic who rules Babylon Restored and has a mysterious connection to Prof.

places.name: Babylon Restored (Manhattan)
places.description: The flooded ruins of Manhattan transformed into a vibrant water-city by the Epic Regalia's powers.

places.name: Babilar
places.description: The colorful neighborhoods built atop the submerged skyscrapers of Manhattan by its resilient inhabitants.

characters.name: Waxillium Ladrian
characters.description: A lawman and nobleman torn between duty and personal loss as he hunts a shapeshifting killer through Elendel.

characters.name: Wayne
characters.description: Wax's loyal partner whose humor masks deep guilt over the man he killed before becoming a lawman.

characters.name: Bleeder (Paalm)
characters.description: A rogue kandra with a personal connection to Wax who seeks to free Scadrial from Harmony's control.

characters.name: Marasi Colms
characters.description: A constable who investigates the political dimensions of the murders plaguing Elendel.

places.name: Elendel
places.description: The Basin's capital city now roiling with class tensions between the workers and the elite.

places.name: The Governor's Mansion
places.description: The seat of political power in Elendel where the conspiracy behind the murders converges.

characters.name: Waxillium Ladrian
characters.description: A Twinborn nobleman and lawman who leads an expedition to find the legendary Bands of Mourning.

characters.name: Wayne
characters.description: Wax's partner whose quick thinking and disguise skills prove essential on their journey beyond the Basin.

characters.name: Marasi Colms
characters.description: A constable whose analytical mind helps unravel the mystery of the Set and the Bands of Mourning.

characters.name: Steris Harms
characters.description: Wax's fiancee whose meticulous planning and preparation prove invaluable despite her social awkwardness.

places.name: New Seran
places.description: A smaller city outside the Basin where Wax uncovers the Set's activities and their connections to the Bands.

places.name: The Sovereign's Temple
places.description: A hidden southern temple where the legendary Bands of Mourning are rumored to be stored.

characters.name: David Charleston
characters.description: A young man manifesting Epic powers who must find a way to defeat Calamity and save those he loves.

characters.name: Prof (Jonathan Phaedrus)
characters.description: The former Reckoner leader consumed by his Epic abilities who becomes one of the most dangerous Epics alive.

characters.name: Megan
characters.description: David's Epic partner whose dimension-shifting abilities are key to reaching and confronting Calamity.

characters.name: Abraham
characters.description: A Reckoner demolitions expert and loyal friend who stands with David against impossible odds.

places.name: Ildithia
places.description: A city built on a moving platform of salt that slowly grinds across the landscape, formerly Atlanta.

places.name: The Sky
places.description: The mysterious realm in the upper atmosphere where Calamity orbits and the final confrontation takes place.

characters.name: Dalinar Kholin
characters.description: A highprince whose terrible past as the Blackthorn threatens to destroy the coalition he has built against Odium.

characters.name: Shallan Davar
characters.description: A Lightweaver fracturing into multiple personas as she infiltrates the cult of the Unmade in Kholinar.

characters.name: Kaladin
characters.description: A Windrunner who returns to occupied Kholinar on a desperate mission to save the city and its people.

characters.name: Jasnah Kholin
characters.description: A scholar-queen who returns from the dead to lead Alethkar and challenge Odium's forces with ruthless intellect.

characters.name: Venli
characters.description: A singer scholar whose ambitions helped summon the Everstorm and who now questions the path of her people.

places.name: Urithiru
places.description: The tower city serving as the coalition's headquarters, ancient and full of undiscovered secrets.

places.name: Kholinar
places.description: The capital of Alethkar, occupied by enemy forces and corrupted by the Unmade.

places.name: Thaylen City
places.description: A merchant city on the southern coast where the coalition makes its stand against Odium's forces.

characters.name: Spensa Nightshade
characters.description: A fierce and determined young pilot who fights for her right to fly despite her father's cowardly reputation.

characters.name: Jorgen Weight
characters.description: A by-the-book flightleader from a prominent family who clashes with Spensa's rebellious nature.

characters.name: M-Bot
characters.description: An ancient alien ship with a quirky AI personality that Spensa discovers hidden in a cavern on Detritus.

characters.name: Cobb
characters.description: A grizzled veteran pilot and instructor who agrees to train Spensa despite the political risks.

places.name: Detritus
places.description: A planet encased in layers of ancient space platforms where the remnants of humanity hide underground.

places.name: Alta Base
places.description: The military installation where Skyward Flight trains and launches missions against the Krell.

places.name: Igneous Caverns
places.description: The underground caves where human civilization has rebuilt after being driven from the surface.

characters.name: Spensa Nightshade
characters.description: A cytonic pilot who goes undercover at an alien space station to learn the secrets of faster-than-light travel.

characters.name: Vapor
characters.description: A mysterious alien ally who helps Spensa navigate the dangerous politics of the Superiority.

characters.name: Brade
characters.description: A human cytonic working for the Superiority who serves as Spensa's rival and foil.

characters.name: Winzik
characters.description: A seemingly affable alien bureaucrat who conceals dangerous ambitions within the Superiority's government.

places.name: Starsight Station
places.description: A massive alien space station that serves as the diplomatic hub of the Superiority.

places.name: Detritus
places.description: Humanity's home planet still under siege while Spensa undertakes her undercover mission.

characters.name: Navani Kholin
characters.description: A scholar-queen trapped in occupied Urithiru who makes groundbreaking discoveries about the nature of Light and sound.

characters.name: Kaladin
characters.description: A Windrunner battling severe depression and trauma while defending unconscious Radiants in the occupied tower.

characters.name: Shallan Davar
characters.description: A Lightweaver confronting the Ghostbloods and Mraize while struggling to integrate her fractured identities.

characters.name: Venli
characters.description: A singer Radiant secretly bonded to a spren who works to free her people from Odium's control.

characters.name: Raboniel
characters.description: The Lady of Wishes, an ancient Fused scholar who occupies Urithiru and pursues the secret of anti-Light.

places.name: Urithiru
places.description: The tower city occupied by Fused forces where Navani conducts her research and Kaladin fights a guerrilla war.

places.name: Emul
places.description: A Rosharan nation where the coalition fights pitched battles against the singer armies.

places.name: Lasting Integrity
places.description: A spren city in Shadesmar where honorspren put humanity on trial for breaking their oaths.

characters.name: Spensa Nightshade
characters.description: A cytonic pilot lost in the nowhere dimension who must find allies and master her powers to return home.

characters.name: Doomslug
characters.description: Spensa's alien companion whose cytonic abilities prove more important than anyone realized.

characters.name: Chet
characters.description: A mysterious guide in the nowhere who helps Spensa navigate the strange fragments of lost civilizations.

places.name: The Nowhere
places.description: A strange dimension outside normal space filled with fragments of lost civilizations and hostile entities.

places.name: The Pirate Domains
places.description: Territories within the nowhere controlled by various factions surviving among reality fragments.

characters.name: Waxillium Ladrian
characters.description: A Twinborn lawman who must sacrifice everything to stop the Set from destroying Elendel with a devastating weapon.

characters.name: Wayne
characters.description: Wax's irreplaceable partner who faces his ultimate test of courage and selflessness in the fight against the Set.

characters.name: Marasi Colms
characters.description: A senator and investigator who uncovers the Set's connection to the malevolent god Autonomy.

characters.name: Harmony (Sazed)
characters.description: The god of Scadrial who is constrained by his dual nature of Ruin and Preservation, unable to act directly.

places.name: Elendel
places.description: The Basin capital threatened with destruction by the Set's devastating weapon.

places.name: Bilming
places.description: A coastal city outside the Basin where the Set has built their base of operations and weapon.

characters.name: Tress
characters.description: A clever and resourceful window-washer from a small island who crosses deadly spore seas to save her beloved.

characters.name: Hoid
characters.description: The cosmere's most famous worldhopper who narrates the story and serves as the ship's cabin boy.

characters.name: Captain Crow
characters.description: The ruthless and cunning captain of the Crow's Song who exploits her crew through fear and manipulation.

characters.name: Fort
characters.description: A deaf crew member and Tress's loyal friend who communicates through written notes.

characters.name: Charlie
characters.description: Tress's beloved, a king's son who has been cursed and imprisoned by the Sorceress.

places.name: The Emerald Sea
places.description: A vast ocean of verdant aether spores that sprout deadly vines when touched by water.

places.name: The Rock
places.description: Tress's tiny home island surrounded by the spore sea, ruled by a local duke.

places.name: The Sorceress's Island
places.description: The lair of the dreaded Sorceress at the center of the deadly Midnight Sea.

characters.name: Yumi
characters.description: A yoki-hijo from a land of spirits who spends her days in ritual stone-stacking to summon beneficial spirits.

characters.name: Nikaro (Painter)
characters.description: A nightmare painter in the dark city of Kilahito who uses light to capture and neutralize nightmares.

characters.name: Design
characters.description: A cryptic spren who assists Hoid and provides commentary on the unfolding events.

characters.name: Hoid
characters.description: The cosmere worldhopper who narrates the tale and plays a crucial role in the story's resolution.

places.name: Torio
places.description: A land of vibrant spirits and hot springs where yoki-hijo perform sacred rituals of stone-stacking.

places.name: Kilahito
places.description: A dark city perpetually shrouded in shadow where nightmare painters protect the populace from manifested nightmares.

characters.name: Nomad (Sigzil)
characters.description: A cosmere worldhopper fleeing a relentless pursuer who crash-lands on a planet where sunlight is deadly.

characters.name: Elegy
characters.description: A determined young woman from the Ember faction who helps Nomad and fights for her people's freedom.

characters.name: The Cinder King
characters.description: The tyrannical ruler of the planet who controls access to shelter from the deadly sunlight.

characters.name: Auxiliary
characters.description: Nomad's companion knight who can transform into a weapon and is running dangerously low on Investiture.

places.name: Canticle
places.description: A tidally locked planet where civilization must keep moving to stay ahead of the deadly sunlight.

places.name: Beacon
places.description: A mobile city on Canticle that moves along tracks to escape the advancing sunlight.

characters.name: Spensa Nightshade
characters.description: A cytonic pilot who returns home to lead humanity's last stand against the Superiority's invasion.

characters.name: Jorgen Weight
characters.description: A flightleader and cytonic who has been leading Detritus's defense in Spensa's absence.

characters.name: M-Bot
characters.description: The AI companion who has evolved beyond his original programming and faces questions about his own nature.

characters.name: Vapor
characters.description: An alien ally whose knowledge of the Superiority proves vital in the final conflict.

places.name: Detritus
places.description: Humanity's planet-fortress now facing the full might of the Superiority's invasion force.

places.name: The Nowhere
places.description: The cytonic dimension that Spensa has learned to navigate and use as a strategic advantage.

characters.name: Dalinar Kholin
characters.description: A Bondsmith who faces Odium's champion in a contest that will determine the fate of Roshar.

characters.name: Szeth-son-son-Vallano
characters.description: A Skybreaker who returns to Shinovar to confront the leaders who declared him Truthless and uncovers deep corruption.

characters.name: Kaladin
characters.description: A Windrunner who faces his most personal trial yet and must find a new path forward beyond the battlefield.

characters.name: Shallan Davar
characters.description: A Lightweaver who works to finally integrate her identities and confront the truths of her past.

characters.name: Sigzil
characters.description: A former Windrunner and Bridge Four member who takes on the mantle of Herald in the struggle against Odium.

places.name: Shinovar
places.description: The isolated western land of Roshar where Szeth confronts the corrupt leaders who branded him Truthless.

places.name: Urithiru
places.description: The tower city serving as the seat of the coalition and site of the contest of champions.

places.name: The Spiritual Realm
places.description: The realm of Connection and identity where the deepest truths of the cosmere are revealed.

characters.name: Shai
characters.description: A master Forger who rewrites the history of objects — and souls — with carved soulstamps, playing for her life.

characters.name: Gaotona
characters.description: An elderly, honourable arbiter who oversees Shai's work and slowly comes to respect her artistry.

characters.name: Emperor Ashravan
characters.description: The incapacitated Emperor of the Rose Empire, whose soul Shai must reconstruct from history and guesswork.

places.name: The Rose Palace
places.description: The seat of the Rose Empire on Sel, where Shai labours under guard in a sealed room.

characters.name: Lift
characters.description: A ten-year-old (forever) street thief and Edgedancer who slides on Stormlight and refuses to grow up.

characters.name: Wyndle
characters.description: Lift's fretful Cultivationspren, a vine of translucent crystal who would really rather she stopped causing trouble.

characters.name: Nale
characters.description: A Herald and cold, lawful Skybreaker hunting fledgling Surgebinders across Roshar.

places.name: Yeddaw
places.description: A trench-city in Tashikk, carved below ground level, where Lift hides among the crowds.

characters.name: Rysn Ftori
characters.description: A young, wheelchair-using Thaylen merchant and ship-owner with a rare pet larkin named Chiri-Chiri.

characters.name: Lopen
characters.description: The irrepressible, one-armed (then two-armed) Herdazian Windrunner whose jokes never miss.

characters.name: Cord
characters.description: A Horneater archer and daughter of Rock of Bridge Four, seeking her own path.

places.name: Aimia
places.description: A shattered, forbidden island shrouded in deadly protections and older secrets.

characters.name: Kelsier
characters.description: The Survivor of Hathsin, who meets his end and then simply declines to accept it.

characters.name: Leras (Preservation)
characters.description: The dying Shard of Preservation, whose fading mind shapes Scadrial's fate.

characters.name: Ati (Ruin)
characters.description: The Shard of Ruin, patient and inexorable, working toward the world's unmaking.

places.name: The Cognitive Realm
places.description: The realm of thought and Shadesmar, where the dead may yet linger and the Shards contend.

characters.name: Sixth of the Dusk
characters.description: A solitary, superstitious trapper of the isles who bonds with rare Aviar and ventures where others fear to go.

characters.name: Vathi
characters.description: A sharp, ambitious scholar and inventor working to modernise her people and understand the Aviar.

places.name: Patji
places.description: The deadliest island of First of the Sun — the father-island, an avatar of the Shard Autonomy.

places.name: The Emberdark
places.description: The vast dark beyond the isles, where older and stranger things wait.

characters.name: Sixth of the Dusk
characters.description: A superstitious, solitary trapper who works the deadly island of Patji with his Aviar, Sak and Kokerlii.

characters.name: Vathi
characters.description: A scholar from the mainland whose company and machines Dusk deeply distrusts.

places.name: Patji
places.description: The most lethal island of the chain, where thought itself draws predators.

characters.name: Silence Montane
characters.description: A hard, secretive innkeeper and bounty hunter surviving on the edge of the Forests of Hell.

characters.name: William Ann
characters.description: Silence's daughter, learning the grim trade of hunting men among the dead.

places.name: The Forests of Hell
places.description: A frontier woodland ruled by the Shades, where breaking the Simple Rules invites a cold death.

characters.name: Kenton
characters.description: A stubborn, underpowered Sand Master determined to prove himself and save his order.

characters.name: Khriss
characters.description: A Darkside duchess and scholar who has crossed the world seeking knowledge — and Autonomy's secrets.

places.name: The Dayside
places.description: The sun-scorched half of Taldain, where the white sands answer a Sand Master's will.

characters.name: Matisse
characters.description: A young Elantrian who shelters the city's children through its darkest night.

characters.name: Idotris
characters.description: One of the children of fallen Elantris, caught up in the city's desperate hour.

places.name: Elantris
places.description: The fallen city of the gods, on the night of its restoration.

characters.name: Kelsier
characters.description: The future Survivor, raw and grieving, learning to burn metals under a harsh teacher.

characters.name: Gemmel
characters.description: A half-mad Mistborn who trains Kelsier without mercy.

places.name: The Final Empire
places.description: The ash-strewn dominion of the Lord Ruler, in the years before the Survivor's rise.

characters.name: Allomancer Jak
characters.description: A self-styled hero and serial exaggerator whose exploits fill the Basin's broadsheets.

characters.name: Handerwym
characters.description: Jak's dry, sceptical Terris steward, forever correcting the record in the footnotes.

places.name: The Roughs
places.description: The lawless frontier beyond the Basin, backdrop to Jak's dubious heroics.
